name: Yogurt Chicken with Garlic-Mint Dipping Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 Degrees F.
2. Pour yogurt into a wide shallow bowl and set it on your work surface.
3. Season the bread crumbs with salt and freshly ground pepper. Spread crumbs out on a platter and place next to the yogurt.
4. Place a wire rack over a baking sheet and set it aside. Dry chicken pieces.
5. Dip each piece into the yogurt until thoroughly coated on both sides. Then roll each piece in the crumbs, pressing the piece in so that the crumbs adhere evenly.
6. Place chicken on the wire rack.
7. Bake for 40 to 45 minutes.
8. To serve, place a piece of chicken on each of 4 small plates. Pour some sauce into a crescent on the bottom edge of each plate around the chicken but not on it.
9. Place the remaining chicken on a platter and pass the remaining sauce in a clear pitcher. Serve hot or at room temperature.
